chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Transfer App. No. S – 13 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 20.03.2023 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Shoukat Ali Makwal, Advocate for respondent No.2. Mr. Imran Mobeen Khan, Assistant Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through instant Criminal Transfer Application, applicant/accused Talib Hussain seeks transfer of Sessions Case No.482/2022 (Re: The State vs. Waseem Mari & others), arising out of Crime No.49/2022 registered at Police Station Darya Khan Mari under Section 302, 148, 149, 337-H, P.P.C., from the Court of learned 3rd Additional Sessions Judge, Naushahro Feroze to the Court of learned 1st Additional Sessions Judge (M.C.T.C.), Naushahro Feroze on the ground that two Sessions Cases bearing No.483/2017 and 126/2018, wherein the applicant is complainant and respondent No.2, the complainant of Crime No.49/2022, is one of the accused are pending adjudication and for the convenience of the parties, aforementioned three cases should be proceeded before one and the same Court. Learned Counsel for respondent No.2/complainant records his no objection for the grant of this Criminal Transfer Application. Considering the convenience of the parties and witnesses, I deem it appropriate that aforementioned three cases should be proceeded by the same Court; hence, Sessions Case No.482/2022 is withdrawn from the Court of learned 3rd Additional Sessions Judge, Naushahro Feroze and transferred to the Court of learned 1st Additional Sessions Judge (M.C.T.C.), Naushahro Feroze for its disposal in accordance with law.

Learned Counsel for respondent No.2/complainant records his no objection for the grant of this Criminal Transfer Application. Considering the convenience of the parties and witnesses, I deem it appropriate that aforementioned three cases should be proceeded by the same Court; hence, Sessions Case No.482/2022 is withdrawn from the Court of learned 3rd Additional Sessions Judge, Naushahro Feroze and transferred to the Court of learned 1st Additional Sessions Judge (M.C.T.C.), Naushahro Feroze for its disposal in accordance with law. The Criminal Transfer Application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
